name: ORASURE TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: The company develops, manufactures, markets, sells and distributes diagnostic products and sample management solutions. Its diagnostic products include rapid point-of-care tests for HIV, Hepatitis C, Syphilis, Sickle Cell, and COVID-19. Sample management solutions are used by clinical laboratories, researchers, and pharmaceutical companies.

exposures.sentence: Our diagnostic products include tests for diseases including HIV, Hepatitis C virus (HCV), Syphilis, Sickle Cell and COVID-19 that are performed on a rapid basis at the point of care.

The Company's business also includes sample management solutions and services that are used by clinical laboratories, direct-to-consumer laboratories, researchers, pharmaceutical companies, and animal health service and product providers.

catalysts.event: Submitted 510(k) for rapid molecular self-test for CT/NG
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Company submitted a premarket notification (510(k)) to the FDA for clearance of its rapid molecular self-test for Chlamydia trachomatis and Neisseria gonorrhoeae (CT/NG), which is currently under review.

catalysts.event: Submitted 510(k) for Colli-Pee at-home urine collection device for STIs
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, the Company also submitted a 510(k) to the FDA for clearance of its Colli-Pee at-home urine collection device for sexually transmitted infections, which is currently under review.
In November 2025, the Company acquired BioMedomics, Inc. ("BioMedomics"), pursuant to which BioMedomics became a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company.

catalysts.event: OraQuick HIV Self-Test received Health Canada license
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company announced that the OraQuick HIV Self-Test (International) received a license from Health Canada for use in Canada and is Canada's first oral HIV self-test.
